reference: Hi, I have a small hard white lump on my back with a black spot in the middle. The lump only hurts when I lie on my back or lean against something that touches the lump on my back. It does not hurt at any other time. I have made an appointment to see my doctor this week, but it is worrying me as to what it could be.
text: Hi, I have a small hard white lump on my back with a black spot in the middle. The lump only hurts when I lie on my back or lean against something that touches the lump on my back. It does not hurt at any other time. I have made an appointment to see my doctor this week, but it is worrying me as to what it could be.
